summary: Tested complaints CRUD backend, branding (logo/school name) on login + sidebar, complaints badge with overdue rose color, overdue-alert banner, filters, full status flow (pending->in_progress->resolved) and delete. All backend (10/10) and frontend flows passed.

issues: React warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for DialogContent. Not blocking but accessibility nit.

Subtitle still reads 'Welcome to SchoolPro Management System' even though custom school name 'High Five' is set. Consider also using branding.schoolName here for consistency with login/sidebar branding.

action_items: Optional: replace hard-coded 'SchoolPro Management System' subtitle on the Dashboard greeting with the dynamic school name from /api/settings/school for branding consistency.
Optional: pass DialogDescription (or aria-describedby) to the Submit Complaint DialogContent to silence the Radix a11y warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Complaints endpoint accepts createdBy/createdByUsername/createdByRole as free-form strings from the client; backend should ideally derive these from an authenticated session token to prevent spoofing. Currently any client can post a complaint claiming to be any user.
DELETE /api/complaints/{id} is open and not role-restricted - any caller (even teacher) can delete any complaint. Per UX intent only admin/super_admin should be able to delete.

PUT /api/complaints/{id} status transition is not validated (e.g., you can jump pending -> resolved skipping in_progress, or move resolved back to pending). Acceptable but worth a comment in the model.
test_credentials: Super Admin: admin / 12345678; Teacher: teach1 / pass123
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed complaints during tests and cleaned them all up (module-level fixture + explicit DELETEs). Verified /api/complaints/overdue-count == {overdue:0,pending:0,inProgress:0} at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login page exposes data-testid='login-school-logo' and 'login-school-name'. Sidebar shows the same logo+name when settings/school.schoolName != 'SchoolPro'. Complaints page selectors: complaint-title, complaint-desc, complaint-due, complaint-priority, complaint-photo-file, submit-complaint-btn, new-complaint-btn, filter-{all|mine|pending|in_progress|resolved|overdue}, complaints-badge (rose-500 if any overdue else amber-500), overdue-alert, complaint-{id}, start-{id}, resolve-{id}, delete-{id}. Backend complaints endpoints under /api/complaints with overdue-count helper at /api/complaints/overdue-count. PDF invoice endpoints /api/fees/invoice/{id} and /api/fees/invoice-view/{id} both return application/pdf with the school logo embedded.
